channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Can a $25B Investment Surge Sustain Micron’s 20% AI Memory Grab?
item.description: Behind every cutting-edge AI chip is a critical bottleneck: the memory required to feed it data. High-bandwidth memory (HBM) is now so highly sought after... [ServiceNow]

item.title: Alphabet Shares Dip 0.47% as Investors Weigh AI Spending vs. Antitrust Risks Ahead of Q1 Earnings
item.description: Alphabet Inc. Class C shares (NASDAQ: GOOG) slipped 1.40 points, or 0.47%, to $296.26 in morning trading Tuesday, April 7, 2026, as investors continued to balance the company's aggressive artificial intelligence investments against ongoing antitrust pressures… [Alphabet, Intel]

item.title: Memory will consume 30% of hyperscaler AI data center spending this year, a 4X increase over 2023 — Nvidia gets preferential supply terms well below stan
item.description: SemiAnalysis estimates on Thursday that memory will account for roughly 30% of total hyperscaler capex in calendar year 2026. [Nvidia]

item.title: Samsung flags jump in quarterly profit on AI chip demand
item.description: Samsung Electronics has today projected its first-quarter earnings would exceed its entire profit for last year, beating expectations as booming demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure stretched supply and drove chip prices higher. [Samsung, Intel]

item.title: Anthropic Making $200 Million Bet on New Enterprise Arm
item.description: Anthropic reportedly plans to invest $200 million in a new venture with private equity firms. This effort would see the artificial intelligence (AI) startup try to sell its tools to the private equity (PE) outfits portfolio companies as it tries to strengthen… [Intel, Anthropic]

item.title: Intel Partners with Tesla and SpaceX on Terafab
item.description: Intel is now officially partnering with Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI on the Terafab project. Terafab is their joint venture for a massive, vertically integrated semiconductor facility (primarily in Austin, Texas) that combines logic chips, memory (HBM), advanced pa… [Intel, Tesla, ServiceNow]

item.title: Robotics-as-a-Service (RaaS) Industry Research 2025-2035: Continuous Improvement in AI, IoT, and Cloud-Based Platforms Drives Market Opportunities
item.description: The Robotics-as-a-Service (RaaS) market is predicted to expand significantly, growing from USD 3.09 billion in 2025 to USD 27.58 billion by 2035 at a CAGR of 24.45%. This growth is fueled by AI advancements, cloud support, and collaborative robotics enhancing…

item.title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square proposes $64 billion merger with Universal Music Group, could value shares at 78% premium
item.description: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square proposed merging Universal Music Group with its investment fund, valuing it at 30.40 euros per share. The deal aims to boost UMG's value through a U.S. listing, despite previous delays and challenges in the competitive music land…

item.title: Is Claude AI Down Again? Claude AI Down Again: Anthropic Faces Fresh Outage Frustrating Users on April 7, 2026
item.description: Anthropic's popular AI chatbot Claude went down again Tuesday, sparking a fresh wave of frustration among millions of users who rely on the service for everything from coding to creative work, as the company grapples with repeated reliability issues amid expl… [Apple, Anthropic]
